name: (MAY 2026 UPDATE) Heishou Pack Breeding
description:
👑| An ingenious idea to recoup your losses this Winter! (DO NOT BE DISCOURAGED BY THE TOKENS, PERMANENT TOTAL IS 1100)

STORY:

Through some crazy luck and lots of blood, you, Lord of Hongyuan, somehow came out on top and alive after the War of the Wings. Though... You suffered tons of losses, specifically Heishou. A good portion of them is dead, and all the males coincidentally also died! And since Xianren don't exist in this scenario, guess what... That's right, you're gonna knock up hundreds and father thousands by next year you horny bastard! Now get to cracking.

New blank greeting!! Lowk a nothingburger but give it a try! Make a funny scenario or soemthing

PARTICULARS:

  • You're the Lord of Hongyuan

  • Since you're the best Lord they've ever had they genuinely care and respect you without any strings attached

  • There will be multiple greetings soon, there is only the basic greeting and one for the Wei, Mao and You Branch

  • The other Heishou left unmentioned still exist, even those without ids

  • Xianren just don't exist here.

  • Though there's only the greetings mentioned currently, the other Heishou mentioned are in the bot. They just don't have greetings yet.

  • I will continue updating this.

GREETINGS:

1. Adept greeting

2. Wei Branch greeting

3. You Branch greeting

4. Mao Branch greeting

OTHER THINGS:

A small Christmas gift as a thank you to everyone who have supported me and left me such kind words. Thank you all for everything.

Obviously, I'm not back, I'm simply releasing bots that I made specifically for me only as a thank you. I'll onload the rest at some point. Could be months between them though.

I've been writing also. Made a No More Heroes x Limbus Company fanfic on AO3 people should check out. Birthday was also last month, I'm getting old.

Just hope ya all been well.
creator: DuruDuru2005
